revision.comment: 「塚穴古墳」を曖昧さ回避で立項。
revision.text:
'''塚穴古墳'''（つかあなこふん）は各地にある古墳。 * [[塚穴古墳 (長野市)]] - 長野県長野市 * [[塚穴古墳 (上田市)]] - 長野県上田市 * [[塚穴古墳 (千曲市)]] - 長野県千曲市 * [[塚穴古墳 (東御市)]] - 長野県東御市 * [[岩室塚穴古墳]] - 滋賀県甲賀市 * [[塚穴古墳 (志摩市)]] - 三重県志摩市 * [[水泥塚穴古墳]] - 奈良県御所市 * [[栗原塚穴古墳]] - 奈良県高市郡明日香村、文武天皇陵に比定。 * [[塚穴古墳 (羽曳野市)]] - 大阪府羽曳野市 * [[塚穴古墳 (河内長野市)]] - 大阪府河内長野市 * [[塚穴古墳 (萩市)]] - 山口県萩市
== 関連項目 == * [[塚穴山古墳]] {{DEFAULTSORT:つかあな こふん}} [[Category:日本の古墳]] {{aimai}}

'''塚穴古墳'''（つかあなこふん）は各地にある古墳。 * [[塚穴古墳 (長野市)]] - 長野県長野市 * [[塚穴古墳 (上田市)]] - 長野県上田市 * [[塚穴古墳 (千曲市)]] - 長野県千曲市 * [[塚穴古墳 (東御市)]] - 長野県東御市 * [[岩室塚穴古墳]] - 滋賀県甲賀市 * 塚穴古墳 (志摩市) - 三重県志摩市 → [[志島古墳群]] * [[水泥塚穴古墳]] - 奈良県御所市 * [[栗原塚穴古墳]] - 奈良県高市郡明日香村、文武天皇陵に比定。 * [[塚穴古墳 (羽曳野市)]] - 大阪府羽曳野市 * [[塚穴古墳 (河内長野市)]] - 大阪府河内長野市 * [[塚穴古墳 (萩市)]] - 山口県萩市
== 関連項目 == * [[塚穴山古墳]] {{DEFAULTSORT:つかあな こふん}} [[Category:日本の古墳]] {{aimai}}

'''塚穴古墳'''（つかあなこふん）は各地にある古墳。
* [[塚穴古墳 (長野市)]] - 長野県長野市 * [[塚穴古墳 (上田市)]] - 長野県上田市 * [[塚穴古墳 (千曲市)]] - 長野県千曲市 * [[塚穴古墳 (東御市)]] - 長野県東御市 * [[岩室塚穴古墳]] - 滋賀県甲賀市 * [[塚穴古墳 (志摩市)]] - 三重県志摩市 → [[志島古墳群]] * [[水泥塚穴古墳]] - 奈良県御所市 * [[栗原塚穴古墳]] - 奈良県高市郡明日香村、文武天皇陵に比定。 * [[塚穴古墳 (羽曳野市)]] - 大阪府羽曳野市 * [[塚穴古墳 (河内長野市)]] - 大阪府河内長野市 * [[塚穴古墳 (萩市)]] - 山口県萩市

revision.text: #REDIRECT [[Tsukaana Kofun (Habikino)]]

'''Tsukaana Kofun''' (塚穴古墳) refers to various kofun (ancient burial mounds) across Japan.
* {{ill|Tsukaana Kofun (Nagano City)|ja|塚穴古墳 (長野市)}} - Nagano City, Nagano Prefecture * {{ill|Tsukaana Kofun (Ueda City)|ja|塚穴古墳 (上田市)}} - Ueda City, Nagano Prefecture * {{ill|Tsukaana Kofun (Chikuma City)|ja|塚穴古墳 (千曲市)}} - Chikuma City, Nagano Prefecture * {{ill|Tsukaana Kofun (Tōmi City)|ja|塚穴古墳 (東御市)}} - Tōmi City, Nagano Prefecture * {{ill|Iwamuro Tsukaana Kofun|ja|岩室塚穴古墳}} - Kōka City, Shiga Prefecture * {{ill|Tsukaana Kofun (Shima City)|ja|塚穴古墳 (志摩市)}} - Shima City, Mie Prefecture → {{ill|Shijima Kofun Cluster|ja|志島古墳群}} * {{ill|Mizuneri Tsukaana Kofun|ja|水泥塚穴古墳}} - Gose City, Nara Prefecture * {{ill|Kurihara Tsukaana Kofun|ja|栗原塚穴古墳}} - Asuka Village, Takaichi District, Nara Prefecture, identified as the tomb of Emperor Monmu * {{ill|Tsukaana Kofun (Habikino)|ja|塚穴古墳 (羽曳野市)}} - Habikino City, Osaka Prefecture * {{ill|Tsukaana Kofun (Kawachinagano City)|ja|塚穴古墳 (河内長野市)}} - Kawachinagano City, Osaka Prefecture * {{ill|Tsukaana Kofun (Hagi City)|ja|塚穴古墳 (萩市)}} - Hagi City, Yamaguchi Prefecture
== Related Topics == * {{ill|Tsukaana-yama Kofun|ja|塚穴山古墳}}
{{Aimai}} [[Category:Kofun in Japan]] [[ja:塚穴古墳]]

* {{ill|Tsukaana Kofun (Nagano City)|ja|塚穴古墳 (長野市)}} - Nagano City, Nagano Prefecture * {{ill|Tsukaana Kofun (Ueda City)|ja|塚穴古墳 (上田市)}} - Ueda City, Nagano Prefecture * {{ill|Tsukaana Kofun (Chikuma City)|ja|塚穴古墳 (千曲市)}} - Chikuma City, Nagano Prefecture * {{ill|Tsukaana Kofun (Tōmi City)|ja|塚穴古墳 (東御市)}} - Tōmi City, Nagano Prefecture * {{ill|Iwamuro Tsukaana Kofun|ja|岩室塚穴古墳}} - Kōka City, Shiga Prefecture * {{ill|Tsukaana Kofun (Shima City)|ja|塚穴古墳 (志摩市)}} - Shima City, Mie Prefecture → {{ill|Shijima Kofun Cluster|ja|志島古墳群}} * {{ill|Mizuneri Tsukaana Kofun|ja|水泥塚穴古墳}} - Gose City, Nara Prefecture * {{ill|Kurihara Tsukaana Kofun|ja|栗原塚穴古墳}} - Asuka Village, Takaichi District, Nara Prefecture, identified as the tomb of Emperor Monmu * {{ill|Tsukaana Kofun (Habikino)|ja|塚穴古墳 (羽曳野市)}} - Habikino City, Osaka Prefecture * {{ill|Tsukaana Kofun (Kawachinagano City)|ja|塚穴古墳 (河内長野市)}} - Kawachinagano City, Osaka Prefecture * {{ill|Tsukaana Kofun (Hagi City)|ja|塚穴古墳 (萩市)}} - Hagi City, Yamaguchi Prefecture

* {{ill|Tsukaana Kofun (Nagano City)|ja|塚穴古墳 (長野市)}} - Nagano City, Nagano Prefecture * {{ill|Tsukaana Kofun (Ueda City)|ja|塚穴古墳 (上田市)}} - Ueda City, Nagano Prefecture * {{ill|Tsukaana Kofun (Chikuma City)|ja|塚穴古墳 (千曲市)}} - Chikuma City, Nagano Prefecture * {{ill|Tsukaana Kofun (Tōmi City)|ja|塚穴古墳 (東御市)}} - Tōmi City, Nagano Prefecture * {{ill|Iwamuro Tsukaana Kofun|ja|岩室塚穴古墳}} - Kōka City, Shiga Prefecture * {{ill|Tsukaana Kofun (Shima City)|ja|塚穴古墳 (志摩市)}} - Shima City, Mie Prefecture → {{ill|Shijima Kofun Cluster|ja|志島古墳群}} * {{ill|Mizuneri Tsukaana Kofun|ja|水泥塚穴古墳}} - Gose City, Nara Prefecture * {{ill|Kurihara Tsukaana Kofun|ja|栗原塚穴古墳}} - Asuka Village, Takaichi District, Nara Prefecture, identified as the tomb of Emperor Monmu * {{ill|Tsukaana Kofun (Habikino)|ja|塚穴古墳 (羽曳野市)}} - Habikino City, Osaka Prefecture * {{ill|Tsukaana Kofun (Kawachinagano City)|ja|塚穴古墳 (河内長野市)}} - Kawachinagano City, Osaka Prefecture * {{ill|Tsukaana Kofun (Hagi City)|ja|塚穴古墳 (萩市)}} - Hagi City, Yamaguchi Prefecture
== See Also == * {{ill|Tsukaana-yama Kofun|ja|塚穴山古墳}}

* {{ill|Tsukaana Kofun (Nagano City)|ja|塚穴古墳 (長野市)}} - Nagano City, Nagano Prefecture * {{ill|Tsukaana Kofun (Ueda City)|ja|塚穴古墳 (上田市)}} - Ueda City, Nagano Prefecture * {{ill|Tsukaana Kofun (Chikuma City)|ja|塚穴古墳 (千曲市)}} - Chikuma City, Nagano Prefecture * {{ill|Tsukaana Kofun (Tōmi City)|ja|塚穴古墳 (東御市)}} - Tōmi City, Nagano Prefecture * {{ill|Iwamuro Tsukaana Kofun|ja|岩室塚穴古墳}} - Kōka City, Shiga Prefecture * {{ill|Tsukaana Kofun (Shima City)|ja|塚穴古墳 (志摩市)}} - Shima City, Mie Prefecture → {{ill|Shijima Kofun Cluster|ja|志島古墳群}} * {{ill|Mizuneri Tsukaana Kofun|ja|水泥塚穴古墳}} - Gose City, Nara Prefecture * {{ill|Kurihara Tsukaana Kofun|ja|栗原塚穴古墳}} - Asuka Village, Takaichi District, Nara Prefecture, identified as the tomb of Emperor Monmu * {{ill|Tsukaana Kofun (Habikino)|ja|塚穴古墳 (羽曳野市)}} - Habikino City, Osaka Prefecture * {{ill|Tsukaana Kofun (Kawachinagano City)|ja|塚穴古墳 (河内長野市)}} - Kawachinagano City, Osaka Prefecture * {{ill|Tsukaana Kofun (Hagi City)|ja|塚穴古墳 (萩市)}} - Hagi City, Yamaguchi Prefecture == See Also == * {{ill|Tsukaana-yama Kofun|ja|塚穴山古墳}}

3 revisions imported: Bot: import full history from ja:塚穴古墳 up to rev 100919829
revision.text:
'''塚穴古墳'''（つかあなこふん）は各地にある古墳。
* [[塚穴古墳 (長野市)]] - 長野県長野市 * [[塚穴古墳 (上田市)]] - 長野県上田市 * [[塚穴古墳 (千曲市)]] - 長野県千曲市 * [[塚穴古墳 (東御市)]] - 長野県東御市 * [[岩室塚穴古墳]] - 滋賀県甲賀市 * [[塚穴古墳 (志摩市)]] - 三重県志摩市 → [[志島古墳群]] * [[水泥塚穴古墳]] - 奈良県御所市 * [[栗原塚穴古墳]] - 奈良県高市郡明日香村、文武天皇陵に比定。 * [[塚穴古墳 (羽曳野市)]] - 大阪府羽曳野市 * [[塚穴古墳 (河内長野市)]] - 大阪府河内長野市 * [[塚穴古墳 (萩市)]] - 山口県萩市
== 関連項目 == * [[塚穴山古墳]]
{{aimai}} {{DEFAULTSORT:つかあな こふん}} [[Category:日本の古墳]]

revision.text:
'''塚穴古墳'''（つかあなこふん）は各地にある古墳。
* [[塚穴古墳 (長野市)]] - 長野県長野市 * [[塚穴古墳 (上田市)]] - 長野県上田市 * [[塚穴古墳 (千曲市)]] - 長野県千曲市 * [[塚穴古墳 (東御市)]] - 長野県東御市 * [[岩室塚穴古墳]] - 滋賀県甲賀市 * [[塚穴古墳 (志摩市)]] - 三重県志摩市 → [[志島古墳群]] * [[水泥塚穴古墳]] - 奈良県御所市 * [[栗原塚穴古墳]] - 奈良県高市郡明日香村、文武天皇陵に比定。 * [[塚穴古墳 (羽曳野市)]] - 大阪府羽曳野市 * [[塚穴古墳 (河内長野市)]] - 大阪府河内長野市 * [[塚穴古墳 (萩市)]] - 山口県萩市
== 関連項目 == * [[塚穴山古墳]]
{{aimai}} {{DEFAULTSORT:つかあな こふん}} [[Category:日本の古墳]]

'''Tsukaana Kofun''' (塚穴古墳) refers to various kofun (ancient Kofuns) across Japan.

* {{ill|Tsukaana Kofun (Nagano City)|ja|塚穴古墳 (長野市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsukaana Kofun (Nagano City)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Nagano City, Nagano Prefecture
* {{ill|Tsukaana Kofun (Ueda City)|ja|塚穴古墳 (上田市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsukaana Kofun (Ueda City)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Ueda City, Nagano Prefecture
* {{ill|Tsukaana Kofun (Chikuma City)|ja|塚穴古墳 (千曲市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsukaana Kofun (Chikuma City)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Chikuma City, Nagano Prefecture
* {{ill|Tsukaana Kofun (Tōmi City)|ja|塚穴古墳 (東御市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsukaana Kofun (Tōmi City)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Tōmi City, Nagano Prefecture
* {{ill|Iwamuro Tsukaana Kofun|ja|岩室塚穴古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iwamuro Tsukaana Kofun|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Kōka City, Shiga Prefecture
* {{ill|Tsukaana Kofun (Shima City)|ja|塚穴古墳 (志摩市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsukaana Kofun (Shima City)|qq=}} - Shima City, Mie Prefecture → {{ill|Shijima Kofun Cluster|ja|志島古墳群|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shijima Kofun Cluster|qq=}}
* {{ill|Midoro Kofun|lt=Midoro Kofun|lt=Mizuneri Tsukaana Kofun|ja|水泥塚穴古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizuneri Tsukaana Kofun|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 水泥古墳}} - Gose City, Nara Prefecture
* {{ill|Kurihara Tsukaana Kofun|ja|栗原塚穴古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurihara Tsukaana Kofun|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Asuka Village, Takaichi District, Nara Prefecture, identified as the tomb of Emperor Monmu

* {{ill|Tsukaana Kofun (Hagi City)|ja|塚穴古墳 (萩市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsukaana Kofun (Hagi City)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Hagi City, Yamaguchi Prefecture

'''Tsukaana Kofun''' (塚穴古墳) refers to various kofun (ancient Kofuns) across Japan.

* {{ill|Tsukaana Kofun (Nagano City)|ja|塚穴古墳 (長野市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsukaana Kofun (Nagano City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Nagano City, Nagano Prefecture
* {{ill|Tsukaana Kofun (Ueda City)|ja|塚穴古墳 (上田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsukaana Kofun (Ueda City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Ueda City, Nagano Prefecture
* {{ill|Tsukaana Kofun (Chikuma City)|ja|塚穴古墳 (千曲市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsukaana Kofun (Chikuma City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Chikuma City, Nagano Prefecture
* {{ill|Tsukaana Kofun (Tōmi City)|ja|塚穴古墳 (東御市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsukaana Kofun (Tōmi City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Tōmi City, Nagano Prefecture
* {{ill|Iwamuro Tsukaana Kofun|ja|岩室塚穴古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iwamuro Tsukaana Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Kōka City, Shiga Prefecture
* {{ill|Tsukaana Kofun (Shima City)|ja|塚穴古墳 (志摩市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsukaana Kofun (Shima City)|qq=}} - Shima City, Mie Prefecture → {{ill|Shijima Kofun Cluster|ja|志島古墳群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shijima Kofun Cluster|qq=}}
* {{ill|Midoro Kofun|lt=Midoro Kofun|lt=Mizuneri Tsukaana Kofun|ja|水泥塚穴古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizuneri Tsukaana Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 水泥古墳}} - Gose City, Nara Prefecture
* {{ill|Kurihara Tsukaana Kofun|ja|栗原塚穴古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurihara Tsukaana Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Asuka Village, Takaichi District, Nara Prefecture, identified as the tomb of Emperor Monmu
* {{ill|Tsukaana Kofun (Habikino)|ja|塚穴古墳 (羽曳野市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsukaana Kofun (Habikino)|qq=}} - Habikino City, Osaka Prefecture
